violations.finding: All three orphan-detection scripts duplicate get_last_modified() and share structurally identical local/global scanning loops, JSON assembly patterns, and orphan-detection logic. detect-orphan-agents.sh and detect-orphan-scripts.sh also duplicate get_commit_count(). detect-orphan-commands.sh duplicates get_last_modified(), age-threshold logic, local/global scanning, and JSON assembly structure.
violations.recommendation: Extract shared utilities (get_last_modified, get_commit_count, JSON assembly) into a sourced lib script (e.g., scripts/lib/orphan-utils.sh), or merge into a unified detect-orphans.sh with a mode parameter (--mode agents|commands|scripts).

violations.finding: Severity-classification thresholds are hardcoded in get_severity() functions: detect-orphan-agents.sh uses hardcoded 60 (major if commit_count<=2 and days>60) and 90 (major if days>90); detect-orphan-scripts.sh uses hardcoded 30 (one-time fix threshold) and 60 (general orphan threshold). These threshold values could reasonably differ between projects or policy configurations.
violations.recommendation: Accept threshold overrides via environment variables with defaults: ORPHAN_MAJOR_COMMIT_DAYS="${ORPHAN_MAJOR_COMMIT_DAYS:-60}", ORPHAN_MAJOR_DAYS="${ORPHAN_MAJOR_DAYS:-90}", ONE_TIME_DAYS="${ONE_TIME_DAYS:-30}".

standards_checked: no-inline-code: N/A — all files are .sh scripts, not .md command/agent files
no-hardcoded-values: pass — PROJECT_ROOT is parameterized via ${1:-.} or ${1:?...}; constant arrays (ONE_TIME_PATTERNS, EXCLUDES) are logic configuration constants, not environment-specific paths
use-source-venv: pass — python3 appears only in comments (detect-orphan-scripts.sh:114,135) describing detection patterns, not as actual invocations
integer-step-numbering: pass — no step numbering present in any of the five scripts
meaningful-naming: pass — all filenames are descriptive of their function; no forbidden patterns (enhance-*, fast-*, *-v2, etc.) found
english-only: pass — no Chinese characters found in any file
concise-documentation: N/A — applies to .md files only; these are shell scripts with minimal inline comments
dangling-references: pass — no broken script references found; all referenced paths use $HOME/.claude and parameterized PROJECT_ROOT
merge-conflicts: pass — conflict-marker strings in detect-merge-conflicts.sh:8,14 are grep pattern arguments, not actual unresolved Git conflict markers

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 4 findings: (1) false positive on Standard 11 claiming detect-merge-conflicts.sh contains actual conflict markers (rejected — these are grep pattern string arguments, not merge conflict state); (2) valid Standard 9 finding on hardcoded age thresholds; (3) factual correction to Standard 7 wording about get_commit_count() duplication; (4) reminder that all violations must be severity:critical.

findings.issue: Standard 11 false-positive claim: detect-merge-conflicts.sh lines 8 and 14 contain literal conflict-marker tokens that the mandatory detector would flag
findings.rationale: The strings on lines 8 and 14 are grep pattern arguments passed to git grep and grep -c, enclosed in single quotes as shell string literals. They are not unresolved merge conflict markers — no file has the tri-part HEAD/separator/branch structure of an actual Git merge conflict. Standard 11 targets unresolved merge state, not scripts that search for those patterns. Adding this would be a false positive.

findings.issue: Standard 9 missed violation: orphan-age severity thresholds (60/90 days in agents, 30/60 in scripts) are hardcoded with no parameter override
findings.proposed_fix: Add Standard 9 finding with recommendation to use ORPHAN_MAJOR_DAYS, ONE_TIME_DAYS env-var overrides
findings.rationale: Standard 9 explicitly lists threshold values as requiring parameterization. These numeric day thresholds could reasonably differ per project policy. Finding added.

findings.issue: Standard 7 evidence factual error: detect-orphan-commands.sh does not define get_commit_count()
findings.proposed_fix: Clarify that only detect-orphan-agents.sh and detect-orphan-scripts.sh duplicate get_commit_count(); detect-orphan-commands.sh duplicates get_last_modified() and structural patterns
findings.rationale: Confirmed by reading detect-orphan-commands.sh — it has get_last_modified() and get_days_since_modified() but no get_commit_count(). Finding wording corrected.

findings.issue: Standard 7 finding must have severity:critical per style-inspector policy
findings.proposed_fix: Set severity to critical on the Standard 7 finding
findings.rationale: Per spec: all violations are critical. Applied.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied 3 of 4 findings: (1) corrected Standard 7 wording to accurately describe get_commit_count duplication scope; (2) added Standard 9 finding for hardcoded age thresholds; (3) confirmed severity:critical on all violations. Rejected finding 1 (Standard 11 false positive on grep pattern strings).
